steps.title: Identify the clue
steps.content: The blank follows "becoming harmful ____". The word "harmful" signals something negative. The noun must describe what discarded electronic devices turn into once thrown away.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• Choice A — "advice": means a recommendation or guidance — an abstract, positive noun; devices cannot become harmful advice. ✗
  • Choice B — "waste": means discarded material that harms the environment — fits exactly; devices thrown away become harmful electronic waste. ✓
  • Choice C — "rewards": means benefits or prizes — positive, contradicts the "harmful" signal. ✗
  • Choice D — "positions": means locations or roles — unrelated to the environmental context of discarded devices. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
